name: Coconut Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. For the crust, combine cracker crumbs and butter in a medium bowl. Mix well with fingers, fork, or pastry blender. Press or pat mixture onto bottom and sides of a well-buttered 10-inch springform pan. Chill for 30 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat cottage cheese, sugar, coconut extract, and 1 egg until smooth. Add remaining eggs one at a time, beating until very smooth. Stir in sour cream and heavy cream until creamy. Pour into chilled pan.
4. Bake in preheated oven for 1-1/4 hours or until set. Cool on wire rack for 30 minutes.
5. For topping, mix sour cream, sugar, and shredded coconut in a small bowl. Spread evenly over cooled cake. Return to oven for 5 minutes or until lightly browned. Let cool completely.
6. Remove sides of springform pan. Decorate with cherry before serving. Refrigerate overnight.
